summary: The user sought advice on maintaining their bathroom sink drain to prevent clogs after experiencing a clog the previous Monday. They also discussed their skincare routine, expressed interest in natural drain cleaners, and requested recommendations for bathroom trash can liners and bath mats, as well as sulfate-free shampoos.
facts: The user experienced a clog in their bathroom sink drain last Monday and used a drain snake to clear it. The user cleaned their bathroom mirrors and countertops with a new glass cleaner last Tuesday, which left them streak-free. The user has been washing their face twice a day in the bathroom as part of their skincare routine. The user is considering switching to a lighter moisturizer for the warmer months. The user replaced the bathroom trash can liner last Sunday and plans to buy more liners this weekend. The user is thinking of buying a new bath mat this weekend due to their current one being worn out. The user has been using a sulfate-free shampoo lately and is looking for recommendations for other sulfate-free shampoos.
